codeReview.summary: Reviewed feature requirements, handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit diff for ad9cff6. The scaffolding implementation covers the requested pyproject dependencies, openenv manifest, package/test directory layout, .gitignore entries, and pytest configuration. No high-confidence correctness issues were identified for this feature scope.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The env-worker skill procedure is overly strict for scaffolding-only features: it requires TDD red/green test cycles even when the expected output is project structure/config and no behavior exists to unit test yet.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/env-worker/SKILL.md (Work Procedure step 2 requires writing failing tests first); handoff.skillFeedback.suggestedChanges explicitly notes scaffolding as a TDD exception; transcript skeleton shows verification used pytest collection startup rather than a red/green cycle.

summary: Result: pass. Feature project-scaffolding is correctly implemented for its defined scope; only a skill-documentation gap was observed.
